flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Denmark Technical College are 29% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($25.4k vs $35.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Denmark Technical College rose 103% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.5k → $15.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Denmark Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (13.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Denmark Technical College rose 63% between 2021 and 2024 (318 → 519).
